name: Applied Epic / AMS360 Insurance Agency API
what_it_does: Vertafore AMS360 Insurance Agency Management System REST API for independent insurance agency operations. Enables AI agents to manage policy and client record management for agency book of business automation, handle policy renewal workflow and expiration tracking for retention management, access commission tracking and reconciliation for agency revenue management, retrieve ACORD form generation and submission for carrier communication automation, manage certificate of insurance issuance for client service automation, handle claims reporting and follow-up for agency claims advocacy, access carrier download and upload integration for policy data synchronization, retrieve cross-sell and upsell opportunity identification for agency growth analytics, manage producer and staff activity tracking for agency operations management, and integrate AMS360 with carrier portals, comparative raters, and agency accounting platforms.
use_cases: Managing policy renewals from retention agents
Issuing certificates of insurance from service agents
Tracking commissions from revenue management agents
Generating ACORD forms from carrier communication agents
not_for: Insurance carriers without agency distribution channel
Non-insurance businesses without policy and commission management
best_when: An independent insurance agency using Vertafore AMS360 wants AI agents to automate policy renewals, certificate issuance, commission tracking, carrier communication, and client service workflows.
avoid_when: E&O LIABILITY RISK: Automated certificate of insurance issuance must verify policy terms, limits, and additional insured endorsements before issuance; incorrect certificate data creates errors and omissions (E&O) liability for the issuing agency. Policy renewal automation — automated renewal processing must not lapse coverage unintentionally; automated non-renewal decisions without insured notification violate state insurance code notice requirements and create coverage gap liability. Commission audit — automated commission reconciliation must identify and escalate premium discrepancies; undetected commission errors accumulate and create carrier dispute and revenue loss risk.

auth.notes: Vertafore AMS360 uses API key and OAuth 2.0 with scopes. REST API with JSON. Documentation at developer.vertafore.com. Bothell, Washington HQ. Founded 1997 (Vertafore). Private (Vista Equity Partners). 20,000+ insurance agency customers. AMS360 is the leading independent agency management system. Competes with Applied Systems Epic for large agency management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-agency annual subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription; per-user and per-agency pricing
pricing.notes: Bothell, Washington. Founded 1997. Vista Equity-backed. 20,000+ agency customers. AMS360 leading independent agency AMS. Competes with Applied Epic for agency management.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: E&O CERTIFICATE LIABILITY: Automated certificate of insurance issuance must verify current policy terms, additional insured endorsements, and limits; incorrect or unauthorized certificate issuance creates agency E&O liability and potential coverage disputes

State insurance non-renewal notice requirements — automated policy non-renewal or cancellation must comply with state insurance code advance notice requirements (10-45+ days depending on state/line); automated non-renewal without proper notice creates coverage gap and regulatory violation

Commission reconciliation errors — automated commission tracking that misses premium adjustments or return premiums creates cumulative commission discrepancies; implement periodic carrier statement reconciliation validation
ACORD form compliance — automated ACORD form generation must use current ACORD form versions; outdated form versions create carrier submission rejection

Carrier download timing — AMS360 carrier download processes run on carrier-controlled schedules; automated workflows dependent on current policy data must account for carrier download lag (can be 24-48 hours)

State surplus lines reporting — automated placement of surplus lines business requires state surplus lines stamping and reporting compliance; automate surplus lines tax and stamping authority notification
agent_readiness.security_notes: Insurance agency management. SOC2. API key/OAuth2 with scopes. US. Policy, commission, and client data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Insurance agency. SOC2. OAuth2 with scopes. US. Policy and client insurance data.
